data.content: 1. crates/loom-cli/src/commands/doctor.rs:329-337 considers bash completions installed when either ~/.bashrc or ~/.bash_profile wires in ~/.bash_completion.d/loom, but fix_completions() at crates/loom-cli/src/commands/doctor.rs:397-408 only appends the managed block to ~/.bashrc. For bash login-shell environments that read ~/.bash_profile without sourcing ~/.bashrc, loom doctor --fix still does not actually enable autocomplete even though subsequent doctor runs can report success. 2. Test coverage only exercises the ~/.bashrc path at crates/loom-cli/src/commands/doctor.rs:613-627, so the bash_profile-only startup case that the checker claims to support is currently untested. Validation rerun during review: cargo test -p loom-cli doctor; cargo test -p loom-cli.
